meta.title: Nexo AI — A technology team and AI automation platform
meta.description: We build products for clients, partner with founders, and operate intelligent systems.

signIn.title: Sign in to Nexo AI
signIn.subtitle: Continue with your Google account to access the platform.
signIn.errorGeneric: Something went wrong signing you in. Try again.
signIn.fine: By continuing you agree to the Terms and Privacy Policy.
signIn.newSubtitle: Create your operator workspace in seconds.
signIn.returningSubtitle: Pick up where you left off — bots, AI agents, execution history.

benefits.3: Pay only for what you use

signIn.socialProof: Built by operators running real systems in production.

signIn.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Wait a minute and try again.
signIn.checkInboxBody: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it to finish creating your account.
signIn.resetSuccess: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.intro: Enter your account email and we'll send you a link to set a new password.
forgotPassword.checkInboxBody: If an account exists for {email}, we sent a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Wait a minute and try again.

resetPassword.intro: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.successBody: Your password has been changed. Redirecting you to sign in…

resetPassword.errorWeakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.

client.title: Build my product
client.body: You have a business and something to ship. We design, develop and deploy apps, platforms and technology systems for you.

partner.title: Technical partnership
partner.body: You have a real idea but no tech team. We become your technical partner with equity arrangements defined by scope and each side's participation.

earn.title: Operate the systems
earn.body: Run bots and AI agents from the Nexo AI library — trading, content, scraping, ops automation — with live monitoring and a community of operators alongside you. Free to start.

proof.title: One team. Three ways to work with us.
proof.desc: Nexo AI is a technology team and an AI automation platform. Founder-led, team-built. The numbers below are what we operate today.
proof.line: Production systems on AWS · Apps & platforms shipped · Architecture built to scale · Bots & AI agents in operation · International client base

client.title: You bring the brief. We ship the build.
client.desc: For businesses with a defined need and a budget. The Nexo AI team designs, develops and deploys platforms, apps and AI-driven systems — ready to operate and scale.

1.title: Validation
1.body: We pressure-test the brief — scope, audience, constraints — before any code.

2.title: Architecture
2.body: Stack, infrastructure, data model and security baseline locked at the start.

3.title: MVP
3.body: A real working build in weeks — not months. Shipped to a real environment.

4.title: Iteration
4.body: Feedback loops, real users, measured improvements. We ship continuously.

5.title: Scale & handover
5.body: Production-ready architecture, documented, with a clean handover or ongoing support.

process.title: From idea to production — a clear path.

1.name: Web & mobile platforms
1.meta: From functional spec to production deploy and handover

2.name: Sensor & detection systems
2.meta: Human-presence and vision tech for activation and marketing events

3.name: Multi-tenant SaaS
3.meta: Architecture, auth, billing, tenancy — built to scale

4.name: Bots & AI agents
4.meta: Trading, content, scraping, ops automation — engineered, deployed, monitored

1.title: Interactive activation system
1.body: On-site human-detection and interactive sensor experience for a consumer-brand activation — engineered for high-traffic events, deployed and supported on-location.

2.title: Pharmaceutical web platform
2.body: Multi-user healthcare platform with RBAC, 2FA and architecture aligned to privacy and scale requirements — built end-to-end with structured handover to the client's team.

3.title: Payments-grade infrastructure
3.body: Cloud architecture for a major global payments processor — multi-account AWS organization under PCI DSS 4.0 governance, with production incident response on critical systems.

partner.title: Got the idea, not the tech?
partner.desc: There are a lot of smart people with good ideas and no way to build them. The Nexo AI partnership hub closes that gap — you bring the vision, the brand brings the team and the engineering.

hero.title: You don't need a budget. You need a builder.
hero.p1: This isn't a client engagement — it's a partnership. If you have a real idea and the drive to push it, but limited resources to hire a dev team, this is the door. We evaluate it together, and if it's a fit, we build it together.
hero.p2: Nexo AI becomes your technical partner for the project — design, architecture, build, deploy — and we share in what it becomes.

1.title: You bring
1.body: The idea, the market insight, the drive, the domain knowledge.

2.title: We bring
2.body: Architecture, full-stack build, cloud infrastructure, deployment, iteration.

3.title: We share
3.body: Equity aligned to the level of work, risk and participation on each side.

1.title: Pitch the idea
1.body: A real conversation first. Then we decide together whether it's worth moving forward formally.

2.title: Scope & fit
2.body: We assess the build, the workload, and whether it's a partnership that makes sense for both sides.

3.title: Structure the deal
3.body: Equity split agreed up front — based on the work involved and each person's input. Clear, fair, written down.

4.title: Build & launch
4.body: We engineer it, ship it, and iterate — as partners in the outcome, not a vendor on a clock.

equity.note: On equity: arrangements are aligned to the level of work, risk and participation on each side. No two deals are identical — bring the idea and we structure what's fair, together, before anything starts.

earn.title: Sign in. Deploy a system. Scale on demand.
earn.desc: Automate operations, content and workflows through AI-driven agents. The Nexo AI platform hosts a growing library of bots and intelligent systems, with a community of operators running them alongside you.

bots.title: A library of intelligent systems. One platform.
bots.p: Create a free account with Google and access the full library — trading, content, scraping, ops automation, AI agents. Test any system in simulation before going live. New tools ship continuously.

feat1.t: Connect with Google and run any system in simulation mode.

feat2.t: Dashboards, metrics and execution history — the same tools we build for ourselves.

feat3.t: Unlock one system or full access through a secure gateway.

feat4.t: New systems and capabilities land as we deploy them.

pricing.title: Start free. Scale when it pays.
pricing.desc: No contracts, no unnecessary sales calls. Pick a tier, connect with Google, running in under a minute.

free.name: Free
free.tag: Create an account and explore the whole platform.
free.f2: Run any system in simulation mode

pro.name: Pro
pro.tag: Full live access to one system (bot, agent, or automation) of your choice.

vip.name: All-Access
vip.tag: Every system (bot, agent, automation), every capability, highest limits.

price.addon: Not ready for All-Access? Unlock any single system à la carte — per-tool pricing at checkout.

academy.title: The operator network — Nexo Academy
academy.p: The platform isn't just tools — it's an operator network. Nexo Academy is the community where builders and operators learn the systems, share what works, and run alongside each other. Free, Premium and All-Access tiers, hosted on Skool. Deeper integration into this platform is on the roadmap.

need.label: What do you need built?
need.ph: A platform, an app, a sensor system...

idea.label: Your idea — what do you want to build?
idea.ph: Describe the idea and the opportunity you see...

bring.label: What do you bring to the partnership?
bring.ph: Domain knowledge, market access, drive, time...

client.fine: We reply within one business day.

partner.fine: No NDA needed to start a conversation. Equity terms are worked out together, up front.

footer.brand: A technology team and AI automation platform. HQ in Mexico City. We build products for clients, partner with founders, and operate intelligent systems with a community of operators.

client.name: Client
client.kicker: For businesses that need a build team
client.lead: You need real technology built for your business — platforms, apps, intelligent systems. Designed, deployed, ready to operate.
client.contactP: A defined brief, a real budget, a team that delivers. Send the project details and we come back with a way forward.
client.ctaSub: A defined project and a team that ships it. That's the client path.

partner.name: Partner
partner.kicker: For founders with an idea and no tech team
partner.lead: Smart idea, real drive, limited resources. You don't need a budget — you need a builder. Bring it here and we build it together, as partners in the upside.
partner.contactP: Bring the idea and what you put on the table. If it's a fit, we structure the equity together — up front, fair, written down.
partner.ctaSub: Your idea, our engineering, shared upside. That's the partner path.

earn.name: Operator
earn.lead: Sign in, browse the library, deploy a system — trading, content, scraping, ops automation. Simulation mode is free. The operator community runs alongside.
earn.contactP: Connect with Google and you're in — every system available in simulation mode, unlock live execution whenever you're ready.
earn.ctaSub: Run the systems, join the operators, scale on demand. That's the platform path.

neutral.lead: Nexo AI is a technology team and an AI-driven automation platform. We build products for clients, partner with founders who have ideas but no tech team, and operate a growing library of bots and intelligent agents.
neutral.contactH3: Choose how you want to work with us.
neutral.contactP: Pick the path that fits — and we start the right conversation from the first message.
neutral.ctaSub: Hire the team, partner on an idea, or operate the platform — start where it fits.

position.line: We build real systems that have to operate, scale, and stay live in production.

operate.title: We ship like operators, not freelancers.
operate.desc: Every project runs with the same operational practices we use on our own production systems. This is what separates serious technical partners from agencies.

1.title: CI/CD pipelines
1.body: Every deploy automated, tested, reproducible. No manual ftp.

2.title: Infrastructure as code
2.body: Terraform-managed AWS. No clickops in production.

3.title: Production monitoring
3.body: Dashboards, alerts, execution history. Same tools we build for clients.

4.title: Multi-environment deploys
4.body: Dev, staging, prod isolation. Promotion gates. No surprises.

5.title: Rollback strategy
5.body: Blue/green or canary by default. A bad deploy never takes prod down.

6.title: Security reviews
6.body: RBAC, 2FA, secret rotation, least-privilege IAM. Built in, not bolted on.

7.title: Documentation handoff
7.body: Runbooks, architecture diagrams, decision logs. Your team can take it over cleanly.

8.title: Weekly demos
8.body: Working software every sprint. Always testable, never theoretical.

9.title: Cloud cost monitoring
9.body: AWS budgets, anomaly detection, tagged resources. We don't burn your money.

items.1: We operate real systems in production
items.2: Cloud architecture experience at enterprise scale
items.3: Direct technical team — no commercial layers
items.5: Built like infrastructure, shipped like product

building.title: Live work in progress.
building.desc: Systems we're operating or shipping right now. Public builds, real production.

1.title: Quantor Polybot
1.body: Async Polymarket trading system — Ollama-driven signals, FastAPI dashboard, SQLite execution log, live production.

2.title: Nexo AI operator dashboard
2.body: The multi-tenant platform you're looking at now. Operators deploy bots and AI agents from a shared library.

3.title: AI clipping infrastructure
3.body: Real-time stream clipping with AI scoring, multi-platform distribution, creator-facing dashboards.

4.title: Real-time sensor analytics
4.body: Human-presence and vision pipelines for activations — sub-second analytics from sensor to dashboard.

5.title: NexoPicks sports platform
5.body: Local sports picks + Telegram bot platform on Node/TS monorepo, Postgres, Redis, Ollama reasoner.

founder.title: Not a brand. A team.
founder.body: Founder-led, with cloud architecture leadership at a major global payments processor, PCI DSS 4.0 production experience across multi-account AWS organizations, and a track record of shipping multi-tenant SaaS, sensor systems, and trading infrastructure. We work the way we build — direct, technical, on-call.
